name: USP消音版 | 蓝图
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been hand painted using a blue theme to resemble an architect's blueprint. Sometimes the best-laid plans go awry
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 它运用了蓝色主题的手绘风格，类似于建筑师的蓝图。 有时，最精心布置的计划也会出错
